evals.prompt: Import the attached robot requirements text file into the workspace and make it ready for later reconciliation.
evals.expected_output: The original file is preserved, normalized text is created with stable chunk anchors, an import record is created, and the agent edits the import record directly before running sync_import_state.py.
assertions: The source file is copied into memory/imports/files
A normalized text file is created under memory/imports/text
An import record is created under memory/imports/records
The agent uses direct import-record edits plus sync_import_state.py

evals.prompt: Bring this requirements file into the workspace and fully reconcile it into canonical topics if possible.
evals.expected_output: The document is ingested first, then the workflow continues into deep distillation using apply_distillation_result.py.
assertions: The workflow reads normalized text rather than relying on the original binary
Deep distillation happens after ingestion rather than replacing it
